theory.canonical_statement: ID5874 records Alternating Sign Boundary We Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\VolumetricEquilibrationHarmonicDuality.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ of alternating sign. On this boundary we impose a radial field oscillation of the form \[ B_{\mathrm{bnd}}(\theta,\phi,t) = B_0\,\mathrm{sgn}\bigl(\sin(n_\theta\theta)\sin(n_\phi\phi)\bigr)\,e^{i\omega t}\,\hat r, \] where $

\[
$ of alternating sign. On this boundary we impose a radial field oscillation of the form \[ B_{\mathrm{bnd}}(\theta,\phi,t) = B_0\,\mathrm{sgn}\bigl(\sin(n_\theta\theta)\sin(n_\phi\phi)\bigr)\,e^{i\omega t}\,\hat r, \] where $
\]
